# Berkeley Nucleonics

> Precision test, measurement, and nuclear instrumentation, engineered and built in the United States since 1963. Eight instrument lines spanning timing, signal generation, waveform synthesis, radiation detection, isotope identification, high-power pulsing, spectrum analysis, and high-voltage power.

## Product lines
- [Pulse & Delay Generators](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/pdg-home.html): Digital delay and pulse generators, femtosecond to multi-channel timing.
- [RF & Microwave Signal Generators & Sensors](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/rfsg-home.html): Signal and vector sources plus USB RF power sensors.
- [Scintillation Detectors (ScintIQ)](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/scintiq-home.html): Spectroscopy-grade scintillator crystals and detectors.
- [Arbitrary Waveform Generators](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/awg-home.html): Deep-memory, high-fidelity arbitrary waveform generation.
- [Isotope ID & Radiation Detection](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/riid-home.html): Handheld and lab radioisotope identifiers and detectors.
- [High Power / Current Pulsers (DEI)](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/dei-home.html): High-voltage and high-current pulse generators.
- [ICX-FieldHawk Spectrum Analyzers](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/index-bold.html): Real-time handheld and rugged spectrum analyzers.
- [PVP High Voltage Power Supplies](https://bnc-draft-website.vercel.app/pvp-home.html): Programmable high-voltage DC supplies.
